title: Maduro’s Successor Is Purging Allies Who Kept Him in Power in Venezuela
dc:creator: Anatoly Kurmanaev and Mariana Martínez
content: The successor to Venezuela’s captured President Nicolás Maduro is purging the people who kept him in power.
contentSnippet: The successor to Venezuela’s captured President Nicolás Maduro is purging the people who kept him in power.

creator: Lynsey Chutel, Euan Ward, Leily Nikounazar and Somini Sengupta
title: Here’s the latest.
dc:creator: Lynsey Chutel, Euan Ward, Leily Nikounazar and Somini Sengupta

creator: Cláudio C. Silva and John Eligon
title: In Angola, Pope Leo XIV Faces the Legacy of Colonialism
dc:creator: Cláudio C. Silva and John Eligon
content: His visit includes a trip to a shrine where enslaved Africans were baptized before being forced into the treacherous voyage across the Atlantic Ocean.
contentSnippet: His visit includes a trip to a shrine where enslaved Africans were baptized before being forced into the treacherous voyage across the Atlantic Ocean.

creator: Amanda Silberling
title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
content: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.
contentSnippet: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.

creator: Julie Bort
title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
contentSnippet: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

creator: Ivan Mehta
title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
content: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.
contentSnippet: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

creator: Amanda Silberling
title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
content: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.
contentSnippet: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.

creator: Aisha Malik
title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
dc:creator: Aisha Malik
content: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.
contentSnippet: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.

creator: Amanda Silberling
title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
content: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.
contentSnippet: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
title: North Korean hackers blamed for $290M crypto theft
dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
content: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.
contentSnippet: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.

creator: Zack Whittaker, Sarah Perez
title: Mastodon says its flagship server was hit by a DDoS attack
dc:creator: Zack Whittaker, Sarah Perez
content: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.
contentSnippet: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.

creator: Sean O'Kane
title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
content: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.
contentSnippet: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.
contentSnippet: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

creator: Ivan Mehta
title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, but it is mainly cosmetic
dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
content: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year.
contentSnippet: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year.

creator: Kirsten Korosec
title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
content: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.
contentSnippet: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

creator: Aisha Malik
title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
dc:creator: Aisha Malik
content: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1% and 3% of the total streams, and 85% of these streams are detected as fraudulent and are demonetized.
contentSnippet: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1% and 3% of the total streams, and 85% of these streams are detected as fraudulent and are demonetized.

creator: Zack Whittaker
title: App host Vercel says it was hacked and customer data stolen
dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
content: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.
contentSnippet: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.

creator: Sean O'Kane
title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
content: The tornado hit a newer part of the factory, primarily used for R2 logistics such as deliveries of parts. Rivian has paused operations in the building and expects to start back up sometime this week.
contentSnippet: The tornado hit a newer part of the factory, primarily used for R2 logistics such as deliveries of parts. Rivian has paused operations in the building and expects to start back up sometime this week.

creator: Anthony Ha
title: OpenAI’s existential questions
dc:creator: Anthony Ha
content: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.
contentSnippet: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.

creator: Connie Loizos
title: The 12-month window
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.
contentSnippet: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.

creator: Sean O'Kane
title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn put a customer satellite in the wrong orbit during its third launch
dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
content: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the moon.
contentSnippet: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the moon.

creator: Anthony Ha
title: Robots beat human records at Beijing half-marathon
dc:creator: Anthony Ha
content: The winning time is a massive improvement over last year’s race, when the fastest robot finished in two hours and 40 minutes.
contentSnippet: The winning time is a massive improvement over last year’s race, when the fastest robot finished in two hours and 40 minutes.

creator: Anthony Ha
title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
dc:creator: Anthony Ha
content: Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."
contentSnippet: Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."
